queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how negative checking account balances function as credit risk drivers and increase the probability of loan default.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: The impact of the absence of a checking account on credit risk assessment and its correlation with elevated determinants of default.
Statistical determinants of default: how extended loan durations in months contribute to increased credit risk and borrower insolvency.
